#
# Generated by Vault/Design/sync-canonical.js
# from Vault/Design/canonical.json guard.rules, profile "sdk".
#
# Editing this file by hand is the defect it was built to remove: it would
# make the ban list a hand-typed copy of canon again. Every string here came
# from canonical.json. To change a ban, change canon and re-run the sync.
# check-positioning.sh verifies rules-sha256 below and will FAIL if you edit
# this file without regenerating.
#
# Fields, tab-separated: type<TAB>label<TAB>reason<TAB>pattern<TAB>include<TAB>exclude
#   type    literal | numeric | regex | dash
#   include git pathspec(s) to scan, "." for everything
#   exclude extra git exclude pathspec(s), "-" for none

dash	em-dash or en-dash	not allowed in README; use a colon, comma or full stop	-	*README.md	-
dash	em-dash or en-dash	not allowed in a package manifest description; use a colon, comma or full stop	-	package.json setup.py pyproject.toml composer.json *.gemspec *.csproj *.nuspec server.json .plugin/plugin.json	-
